; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_factorial
define i32 @InputKt_factorial(i32 %arg0) {
entry:
  %merge_4 = alloca i32
  %t0 = add i32 0, 1
  %t1 = icmp sle i32 %arg0, %t0
  br i1 %t1, label %bb1, label %bb2
bb1:
  %t2 = add i32 0, 1
  store i32 %t2, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb3
bb2:
  %t3 = add i32 0, 1
  %t4 = sub i32 %arg0, %t3
  %t5 = call i32 @InputKt_factorial(i32 %t4)
  %t6 = mul i32 %arg0, %t5
  store i32 %t6, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb3
bb3:
  %t7 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  ret i32 %t7
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 5
  %t1 = call i32 @InputKt_factorial(i32 %t0)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t1)
  %t3 = add i32 0, 10
  %t4 = call i32 @InputKt_factorial(i32 %t3)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t4)
  ret i32 0
}
